title: ptilostemon afer
intro: Ptilostemon afer, also known as African Ironwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ptilostemon afer include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties.
